text.title: Cache Hit Audit Script Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the cache-hit-audit-script methodology end-to-end.

step.name: instrument-cache-tokens
step.action: Confirm every LLM call exports `cache_read_tokens` + `cache_creation_tokens` + `input_tokens` attributes via OTel.
step.decision-gate: If attributes missing, return to trajectory-eval-otel methodology first.

step.name: cluster-by-prefix
step.action: Group calls by SHA-256 of the cached portion (system prompt + tool defs). Compute per-cluster ratio.

step.name: compute-deltas
step.input: Today's cluster table + yesterday's cluster table
step.action: Compute ratio_delta_pp per cluster; flag clusters with delta < -20pp AND calls ≥ 100.

step.name: scan-system-prompt-for-variables
step.input: Cached system prompts + regex pattern set
step.action: Regex check for common cache-poisons: per-user vars, timestamps, session IDs. Flag matches in the report.

step.name: publish-report-and-alert
step.input: Cluster table + flag list + variable scan + Slack webhook
step.action: Render Markdown report → repo + Slack notify. Aggregate alert if overall ratio drops > 15pp vs 7d.
